goal: Add schema migration, Account entity fields, and MemberCreatedEvent record to support per-member sub-accounts

tasks.name: Liquibase migration for account parent/member fields
tasks.action: Create Liquibase migration `006-add-account-member-fields.yaml` that adds two nullable columns to the `accounts` table: `parent_account_code VARCHAR(20)` and `member_id UUID`. Add indexes: `idx_account_member_id` on `member_id`, `idx_account_parent_code` on `parent_account_code`. Register the migration in `db.changelog-master.yaml` under the Ledger module section.

tasks.name: Update Account entity and AccountRepository
tasks.action: Add `parentAccountCode` (String, nullable, length 20) and `memberId` (UUID, nullable) fields to Account entity. Add AccountRepository methods: `List<Account> findByMemberId(UUID memberId)`, `Optional<Account> findByMemberIdAndParentAccountCode(UUID memberId, String parentAccountCode)`, `boolean existsByMemberIdAndParentAccountCode(UUID memberId, String parentAccountCode)`.

tasks.name: Create MemberCreatedEvent record
tasks.action: Create `MemberCreatedEvent` as a Java record in sacco-common event package. Fields: `UUID memberId`, `String memberNumber`, `String firstName`, `String lastName`, `String actor`. Implement `AuditableEvent` with `getEventType()` returning `MEMBER_CREATED`. Follow the exact pattern of `ContributionReceivedEvent`.

commitMessage: feat(member-account-setup): add schema migration, Account entity fields, and MemberCreatedEvent
